raw_consumer_statement:
Home Depot credit card reported lost stolen on or about XX/XX/XXXX, reported to Citibank as soon as noted missing when I attempted to rent a truck. A new card was issued by bank, however several charges appeared on next statement for " XXXX Gift Cards '' for {$150.00}. I disputed charges immediately upon receipt of statement and was issued another new card? Home Depot expected me to pay the errant charges and would resolve in 90 days. I contacted Home Depot Credit via phone and discussed the matter telling them that the charges were not accurate and I did not agree to pay. ( As per some credit card policies, payment constitutes agreement with charge amounts. ) When I log on to my credit card account ending in XXXX, I see a {$0.00} balance and {$5000.00} credit available. I have recieved numerous statements from Citibank with late fees and charges so that my last statement balance is {$560.00} as of XX/XX/XXXX on card ending in XXXX which I have never had in my posession. 
I am angry and frustrated that Home Depot has already reported the issue to credit agencies severely impacting my credit scores.
